author: omerfirmak
content: <@466102668138512394> do you have an idea on when the next zisk release is planned for?

author: han0110
content: Just saw https://github.com/0xPolygonHermez/zisk/pull/1135 and it seems `1.0.0-alpha` is going to be released, when it's released I'd try to upgrade Ere as well, I think it includes the zkvm accelerator fixes (but https://github.com/0xPolygonHermez/zisk/pull/1024 is still open, so the `ziskos-staticlib` will still do allocation, curious how `zevm` handles this).

author: omerfirmak
content: I wasn't aware of this. I can try to work around it, but that definitely needs fixing.

content: wrt accelerators, does the api expect guests to do any preprocessing? like validating inputs etc?
